title: Urgent Care Clinics Move To Fill Abortion Care Gaps in Rural Areas
summary: When the only clinic that offered abortions in Michigan’s rural Upper Peninsula closed, an urgent care facility stepped in to fill the gap. Now, others are considering similar moves as brick-and-mortar clinics close in blue states.

title: Trump’s Personnel Agency Is Asking for Federal Workers’ Medical Records
summary: The administration is asking insurers that cover federal employees and retirees to hand over details about their medical visits, their pharmacy claims, and more.

title: ¿Puedo decirle a mi médico que no quiero que use la inteligencia artificial para tomar notas?
summary: Casi un tercio de las prácticas médicas están utilizando asistentes de IA para tomar notas, y otras están trabajando para incorporar esta herramienta, con el objetivo de reducir el trabajo administrativo.

title: Listen to the Latest ‘KFF Health News Minute’
summary: The "KFF Health News Minute” brings original health care and health policy reporting from our newsroom to the airwaves each week.

title: Personas mayores inmigrantes pierden la cobertura de Medicare a pesar de haber aportado por años
summary: La ley One Big Beautiful Bill Act del Partido Republicano, firmada en julio pasado por el presidente Donald Trump, prohíbe que ciertas categorías de inmigrantes con presencia legal accedan a Medicare.

title: Can I Opt Out of Having My Doctor Take Notes With AI?
summary: Your doctor might ask to have an AI tool listen during your next appointment. If you opt in, you will likely get more of your doctor’s attention. But the technology is not perfect. Here’s what to know.

title: This Northern Cheyenne Doula Was About To Start Getting Paid — Then Medicaid Cuts Hit
summary: Montana was on track to start reimbursing doulas, who support new and expectant parents, through Medicaid this year. But state officials halted that plan amid a budget shortfall. Other such services deemed optional under Medicaid are at risk nationwide as states brace for federal cuts.

title: La búsqueda de Trump de inscritos indocumentados en Medicaid arroja muy pocos infractores
summary: Siete meses después, los resultados de cinco estados compartidos con KFF Health News muestran que las revisiones han encontrado poca evidencia de que este sea un problema generalizado.

title: Científicos de Estados Unidos secuencian 1.000 genomas del sarampión, eliminado durante años gracias a las vacunas
summary: Científicos familiarizados con el proceso esperan que los CDC publiquen muchos más datos en las próximas semanas, lo que permitirá ver si Estados Unidos ha perdido su estatus de país libre de sarampión, logrado con tanto esfuerzo.

title: Immigrant Seniors Lose Medicare Coverage Despite Paying for It
summary: Rosa María Carranza has worked and paid taxes for more than two decades, but a provision in the GOP's One Big Beautiful Bill Act will make her and an estimated 100,000 other lawfully present immigrant seniors ineligible for Medicare. Now Carranza’s once secure retirement is in question.
